appliedUpdates.description: Fixed test command: removed --maxWorkers=4 flag which causes RangeError (options.minThreads and options.maxThreads must not conflict) with tinypool in vitest 2.1.9. Command changed from 'npx vitest run --maxWorkers=4' to 'npx vitest run'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the Tailwind Design Tokens section examples to use shade-numbered token classes. Change 'text-primary, bg-accent' to 'text-primary-500, bg-accent-500'. Since primary/accent/etc. are defined as objects with shade keys (50-900), using 'text-primary' without a shade number does NOT work in Tailwind. Workers must always include the shade suffix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: design-system-foundation worker correctly used text-primary-500/bg-accent-500 in all 17 files, but AGENTS.md still says 'text-primary, bg-accent'. The shared-ui-components worker used hover:bg-blue-50 (non-token) in Button.tsx, possibly confused by the ambiguous example. Two independent observations from both reviews flagged this same gap.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note under Component Structure: 'Future features should migrate remaining raw <button> elements to the shared Button component, especially on product detail and event detail pages.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-ui-components review found app/events/[id]/page.tsx and app/products/[id]/page.tsx still use raw <button> elements with inline gradient styles instead of the shared Button component. The feature description didn't require this migration, but it's an incomplete adoption that future workers should address.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md already documents the motion/Tailwind design token conventions comprehensively. No gaps found.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not actionable — confirms conventions are already documented. No change needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md correctly documents that shared UI components (Button, AnimatedModal, Toast, Skeleton) should be used.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not actionable — confirms existing documentation is correct.

rejectedObservations.observation: The 'useToast must be used within ToastProvider' error message pattern is good practice but not in AGENTS.md.
rejectedObservations.reason: Implementation detail — standard React context hook pattern. Not worth formalizing as a convention in AGENTS.md.
